name: No Tenemos Rancho Applesauce Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the dry ingredients.
2. Add nuts and raisins to the sifted dry ingredients.
3. Stir in the oil, vanilla, and hot applesauce until well combined.
4. Pour the batter into a 9 x 13-inch pan.
5. Bake at 350 degrees F. for 30 to 40 minutes or until done.
